name: Black and White Cheesecake Bars
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 325°F. In a medium saucepan, melt the chocolate chips and butter over very low heat or in the microwave on Power 6. Stir until smooth. Stir in the graham cracker crumbs. Reserve 1/4 cup of the crumb mixture and press the rest into a 13x9 inches baking pan. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Gradually beat in the condensed milk, then the egg and vanilla. Pour the mixture over the prepared crust. Sprinkle with the reserved crumbs and bake at 325°F for 25-35 minutes until set. Cool completely to room temperature on a wire rack, then refrigerate for 2 hours or longer. Cut into 24 squares.
